${modID}:BrewingStrike.NAME: Brewing Strike
${modID}:BrewingStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Damage equals half the highest potency among your potions.
${modID}:BrewingStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Damage equals the highest potency among your potions.

${modID}:FumeVeil.NAME: Fume Veil
${modID}:FumeVeil.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Block equals half the highest potency among your potions.
${modID}:FumeVeil.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Block equals half the highest potency among your potions.

${modID}:Stimulant.NAME: Stimulant
${modID}:Stimulant.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! card. NL Draws another card for each potion you have that's at its maximum potency.
${modID}:Stimulant.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! card. NL Draws another card for each potion you have that's at its maximum potency.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! card. NL Draws another card for each potion you have that's at its maximum potency.
Draw !M! cards. NL Draws another card for each potion you have that's at its maximum potency.

${modID}:Overdose.NAME: Overdose
${modID}:Overdose.DESCRIPTION: When you drink a potion, the target takes damage equal to its potency.
${modID}:Overdose.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: When you drink a potion, the target takes damage equal to its potency.
